name: grace_window_period_no_repause
description: Warm day with planned window period 06:00–10:00 (windows_recommended=True, hvac_mode=off). Sensor opens at 07:00 during window — planned window gate suppresses pause. Grace might start; sensor opens again at 07:05 during window → no re-pause (within window). No pause fires at any point during the window period.
unsupported_reason: Integration-tier: the planned-window gate that suppresses pause when a sensor opens during the scheduled window period is implemented in the coordinator's _handle_contact_sensor_change listener via _is_within_planned_window_period(). The Tier-A harness dispatches sensor_open events directly into the production AutomationEngine without going through the coordinator's contact-sensor state-listener layer. As a result, the window-gate check is never reached — sensor_open is processed directly and the last event (classification_applied) is returned instead of no_action. Deferred to Tier-B HeadlessTarry harness (#236 follow-on) which wires the full coordinator state-listener layer including _handle_contact_sensor_change.
notes: Tests: planned window gate suppressing pause when sensor opens during window period.
When classification has hvac_mode='off' + windows_recommended=True + window_open_time/close_time set, and event time is within the window, sensor_open returns no_action.
This is a fully logic-track scenario — no gap closures required.
Note: _is_within_planned_window_period() requires classification.hvac_mode == 'off' to be true. The warm-day classification with windows_recommended uses hvac_mode='off'.
Contrast with non-window scenarios where sensor_open during warm day → nat vent or pause.

events.note: Early morning. Indoor 72F, outdoor 64F. Conditions favorable for planned window ventilation.
Warm-day classification with planned window 06:00–10:00. hvac_mode=off during window.
Window opens at 07:00, within planned window period (06:00–10:00). Window gate should suppress pause.
Second window opens at 07:05. Still within window period — no pause, no change.
Mid-morning. Ventilation working, indoor cooling slightly. Still within window period.

assertions.reason: Warm-day classification applied: hvac_mode=off, windows_recommended=True, window 06:00–10:00.

Sensor opens at 07:00, within planned window period 06:00–10:00. _is_within_planned_window_period() returns True (classification.hvac_mode='off', windows_recommended=True, 07:00 is in [06:00,10:00]). Coordinator returns no_action — no pause, no nat vent.
Second sensor opens at 07:05, still within window period. Already suppressed — no_action again.

verdict.summary: Planned window period gate suppresses pause when sensor opens during the scheduled window
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied (off, windows_recommended) → no_action on sensor_open (07:00, within window) → no_action on second sensor_open (07:05)
verdict.expected_behavior: During planned window hours, sensor openings are expected and do not trigger pause or nat-vent logic
